scope: future evidence plan; no new DEM result is claimed by this file

records.why_it_matters: Tests whether the mid-loading local blockage and BTC response are robust rather than seed-specific.
records.minimum_success_gate: At least three valid repeats with final BTC, retention, Bmax and outlet-connected fraction.
records.manuscript_upgrade: Changes loading statement from single-seed sensitivity to seed-bounded loading response.
records.claim_if_successful: Loading mainly amplifies local deposition across repeats without measurable connectivity loss.
records.claim_if_not_successful: Loading response is stochastic; retain only bounded single-window interpretation.

records.why_it_matters: Bounds the strongest current local-blockage point and tests whether the 0.21% OpenFOAM pressure-change interpretation is repeat-stable.
records.minimum_success_gate: At least three valid repeats with Bmax, C_loss and pressure-handoff candidate profiles.
records.manuscript_upgrade: Turns the highest loading state into a seed-bounded stress point.
records.claim_if_successful: The present high-loading state remains pre-clogging under seed variation.
records.claim_if_not_successful: A subset of seeds may approach pore-network degradation; identify those for pressure handoff.

records.why_it_matters: Tests whether a higher inventory leaves the O(1e-5) blockage window or still remains perturbative.
records.minimum_success_gate: Stable transport to the same observation window; postprocessed BTC, Bmax, C_loss and candidate hydraulic profile.
records.manuscript_upgrade: Adds a stress-test point without claiming a universal critical threshold.
records.claim_if_successful: Even doubled inventory remains pre-clogging, strengthening the decoupling conclusion.
records.claim_if_not_successful: Provides the first candidate transition state for focused hydraulic validation.

records.parameter_focus: two matched Fd/W states using different df/dp and ug
records.why_it_matters: Tests whether drag-to-weight ratio is a useful organizing coordinate rather than a hidden size-only trend.
records.minimum_success_gate: Matched Fd/W cases show comparable penetration metrics within a bounded tolerance or expose a size-specific correction.
records.claim_if_successful: Fd/W is an interpretable first-order migration coordinate for the current DEM window.
records.claim_if_not_successful: Add debris-size dependence to the mechanism map and avoid compact Fd/W collapse language.

records.parameter_focus: worst Bmax/C_loss state selected from Phase-II DEM outputs
records.why_it_matters: Converts the strongest new local-blockage state into a pressure-response check.
records.minimum_success_gate: Passing mesh/solver logs and a pressure-drop comparison against the current baseline handoff.
records.manuscript_upgrade: Upgrades hydraulic consequence from current cases to the strongest Phase-II stress state.
records.claim_if_successful: Hydraulic response remains perturbative or identifies a pressure-relevant outlier.
records.claim_if_not_successful: Keep OpenFOAM as screening-only and do not use it for pressure-calibrated Ib.
